title: Looks for Trouble
summary: You’re a scrapper and love a good fight.
tiers: Tier 3: Skill With Attacks or Greater Enhanced Potential
Tier 6: Greater Enhanced Might or Lethal Damage
gm_intrusions: Weapons break or fly from even the strongest grip. Brawlers trip and fall. Even the battlefield can work against you with things falling or collapsing.
text: You’re a scrapper and love a good fight.
details: You’re a scrapper and love a good fight.
